# platformCopyGraph

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for platformCopyGraph

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = usePlatformCopyGraphMutation(); mutate({ input: { databaseId: '<UUID>', graphId: '<UUID>', name: '<String>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use usePlatformCopyGraphMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = usePlatformCopyGraphMutation();
mutate({ input: { databaseId: '<UUID>', graphId: '<UUID>', name: '<String>' } });
```
